project_type: Full-stack monorepo: Node.js/Express/TypeScript backend + React/TypeScript/Vite frontend
build_system: npm workspaces monorepo with separate backend and frontend packages
test_framework: Jest for backend API tests, Vitest for frontend component tests
build_command: npm run build (from root, builds both backend and frontend)
test_command: npm test (from root, runs both backend and frontend tests)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install from root. 2. Run npm run build to compile TypeScript. 3. Run npm test to run all tests. 4. Start backend with npm run dev:backend, frontend with npm run dev:frontend.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/Institute-ERP. 2. npm install (installs all workspace deps). 3. Copy .env.example to .env and configure. 4. npm run build. 5. npm test.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full package access. Node.js v22, npm 11.4. Docker available for containerization. No MongoDB/PostgreSQL pre-installed - will use SQLite via Prisma for portability and zero-config setup.
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - establishing conventions from scratch.
key_patterns: Monorepo with npm workspaces. Backend: Express + TypeScript + Prisma ORM + SQLite + JWT auth + role-based middleware. Frontend: React + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + React Router v6 + role-based routing. REST API with consistent response format. Feature-based folder organization.
directory_structure: / (root) - monorepo workspace config. /backend - Express API server. /backend/src - source code. /backend/src/routes - API routes by module. /backend/src/middleware - auth, validation. /backend/src/services - business logic. /backend/prisma - database schema and migrations. /frontend - React SPA. /frontend/src - source code. /frontend/src/pages - page components by role. /frontend/src/components - shared components. /frontend/src/hooks - custom hooks. /frontend/src/services - API client.
